measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a one-year excess property-tax levy collected in 2027 for cemetery maintenance and operation expenses.
measures.cost_line: Raises $40,000 at approximately $0.25 per $1,000 of assessed value, equal to about $25 per $100,000 or $125 on $500,000; the property examples are arithmetic illustrations.
measures.pro_summary: No official pro statement was submitted; the ballot title identifies cemetery maintenance and operation as the authorized use.
measures.con_summary: No official con statement was submitted; the direct tradeoff is the one-year property-tax cost versus $40,000 for cemetery maintenance and operations.

taxes.basis: YES authorizes a one-year local excess property-tax levy at the stated approximate rate.

spending.basis: YES supplies $40,000 in dedicated public funding for cemetery maintenance and operations.

measures.sources_note: Official sample ballot and local voters' pamphlet (S1, S2); neither includes a submitted pro or con statement, and the pamphlet has no separate explanatory statement.
